goal: Complete T0101-T0107 with synthetic data, official age, zero Secret and zero external write.
scope: official age round-trip through an in-memory ciphertext store
versioned JSON Schema and Pandera contracts
non_goals: Processed parsers and deterministic Timeline rendering
rollback: Revert the single local Stage 1 commit; Stage 0 remains at the pinned baseline commit.
stop_conditions: real or sensitive value enters the public tree
an external credential or write becomes necessary
